# Vegan Ipsum – LLM Context File

## Project Overview
Name: Vegan Ipsum
Description: Plant-based, ethical placeholder text generator for designers, developers, and teams. Provides vegan-themed content for web projects, mockups, and prototypes.
Website: https://veganipsum.vercel.app
Category: Developer Tools
Classification: Vegan Lorem Ipsum Generator, Placeholder Text Generator
License: MIT License
Copyright: 2025, Vijay Hardaha

## Brand Identity
Tagline: Ethical Placeholder Text for a Better World
Mission: Replace outdated Latin filler text with ethical, plant-based content that inspires conscious creation
Core Values: Ethical Branding, Conscious Design, Developer-First Tooling, Seamless Workflow

## Target Audience
- Ethical Startups: Consistent brand voice from prototype stage
- Vegan Brands: Replace Latin filler with industry-relevant terminology
- Sustainability Teams: Align internal tools with environmental mission
- Creative Designers: Craft immersive, plant-based product previews

## Author Information
Name: Vijay Hardaha
Social Links:
  GitHub: https://github.com/vijayhardaha
  X (Twitter): https://x.com/vijayhardaha
  Instagram: https://instagram.com/vegan.vijay
  PeoplePerHour: https://pph.me/vijayhardaha

## Website Pages

### Home (/)
Title: Vegan Ipsum – Ethical & Plant-Based Lorem Ipsum Generator
Description: Generate ethical, plant-based placeholder text with Vegan Ipsum. Perfect for vegans and conscious designers.
Sections: Hero, Ipsum Generator, Methods, Overview, Benefits, Audience, Use Cases, Contact

### About (/about)
Title: About Vegan Ipsum – Mission Behind the Ethical Placeholder Generator
Description: Discover the story behind Vegan Ipsum, a plant-based alternative to Lorem Ipsum.
Sections: Introduction, Background, Core Features, Customization Options, Technical Overview, Use Cases, CTA

### Contact (/contact)
Title: Contact Vegan Ipsum – Creator Profile & Project Links
Description: Connect with the creator and explore the Vegan Ipsum ecosystem.
Sections: Projects, Author

### JSON API (/json-api)
Title: Vegan Ipsum API – Free JSON Placeholder Text API
Description: High-performance REST API to fetch ethical, plant-based placeholder text.
API:
  Base URL: https://veganipsum.vercel.app/api
  Authentication: None
  Methods: GET only
  Output Formats: JSON, Plain Text, HTML
Sections: Introduction, Base URL, Request Methods, Parameters, GET Request Example, Response Format, Error Handling, Status Codes

### Node CLI (/node-cli)
Title: Vegan Ipsum CLI – Generate Ethical Placeholder Text in Terminal
Description: Lightweight Node CLI for generating plant-based placeholder text.
Sections: Introduction, Installation, Usage, Options, Resources
NPM Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/vegan-ipsum
GitHub: https://github.com/vijayhardaha/node-vegan-ipsum
Version: 1.0.4

### NPM Package (/npm-package)
Title: Vegan Ipsum NPM Package – Ethical Lorem Ipsum Library
Description: Integrate plant-based placeholder text into JavaScript projects.
Sections: Introduction, Installation, Usage, Features
NPM Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/vegan-ipsum
GitHub: https://github.com/vijayhardaha/node-vegan-ipsum
Version: 1.0.4

### VS Code Extension (/vscode-extension)
Title: Vegan Ipsum VS Code Extension – Ethical Placeholder Text
Description: Generate plant-based placeholder text directly in VS Code.
Sections: Introduction, Installation, Usage, Features, Support
Marketplace: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=vijayhardaha.vegan-ipsum
GitHub: https://github.com/vijayhardaha/vscode-vegan-ipsum
Version: 1.0.1
Requirements: VS Code v1.80.0+

## Ecosystem & Tools
REST API: High-performance, no auth, GET-only, JSON endpoints
Node CLI & NPM Package: Lightweight, zero dependencies, TypeScript-ready
VS Code Extension: Insert Vegan Ipsum text directly in editor
Website: Central hub for tools, documentation, and guides

X (Twitter): https://x.com/vijayhardaha
Instagram: https://instagram.com/vegan.vijay

Audience: Developers, designers, content creators, sustainability advocates
